# Generated by reflaxe.c from hxc.manifest.json build schema 1.
# Optional adapter: the JSON manifest remains the build-system-neutral authority.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project([[emitter-fixture]] LANGUAGES C)

add_executable(hxc_program
  [[../src/emitter_fixture.c]]
  [[../src/hxc_boot.c]]
)

set_target_properties(hxc_program PROPERTIES
  C_EXTENSIONS OFF
  C_STANDARD 11
  C_STANDARD_REQUIRED YES
  RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/bin"
)

if(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "^(GNU|Clang|AppleClang)$")
  target_compile_options(hxc_program PRIVATE
    [[-Wall]]
    [[-Wextra]]
    [[-Werror]]
    [[-pedantic]]
    [[-Wshadow]]
    [[-Wconversion]]
    [[-Wsign-conversion]]
    [[-Wstrict-prototypes]]
    [[-Wmissing-prototypes]]
    [[-Wundef]]
    [[-Wformat=2]]
    [[-Wimplicit-fallthrough]]
    [[-Wcast-align]]
    [[-Wcast-qual]]
  )
endif()

target_include_directories(hxc_program PRIVATE
  [[../include]]
)

target_compile_definitions(hxc_program PRIVATE
  [[HXC_ADAPTER_TEXT="adapter\073\044\074ignored\076\073quote\047\042\134end"]]
  [[HXC_EMITTER_FIXTURE=1]]
)

target_link_libraries(hxc_program PRIVATE
  [[m]]
)
